name: HEX_RUN_DOR_DELIVERY_DTLS
description: The table stores the delivery details for all the objects for DOR and UCM

columns.Name: HEX_RUN_DOR_DEL_OPTION_ID
columns.Comments: The column is a unique sequence generated value

columns.Name: FRAGMENT_NO
columns.Comments: The column indicates the thread allocated to the fragment

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the document type id

columns.Name: DEL_NAME_DE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the run time file name generated

columns.Name: ISSUED_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the date of issue

columns.Name: TIMEZONE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the timezone

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the related object id

columns.Name: VERIFIED_BY
columns.Comments: The column indicates the DOR verification user

columns.Name: VERIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the DOR verification date

columns.Name: EXT_DELIVERY_OPTION_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the foreign key reference to the delivery option id from PER_EXT_DELIVERY_OPTIONS_B

columns.Name: EXT_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the EXT_RUN_ID from HEX_RUNS table

columns.Name: DEL_PREF
columns.Comments: The column indicates the delivery preference

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_ID_COL
columns.Comments: The column indicates the related object id col

columns.Name: RELATED_OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: The column indicates the related object name

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the status of DOR

columns.Name: SYSTEM_DOCUMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the type of the document

columns.Name: ISSUING_AUTHORITY
columns.Comments: The column indicates the issuing authority

columns.Name: ISSUING_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: The column indicates the issuing country

columns.Name: ISSUING_LOCATION
columns.Comments: The column indicates the issuing location

columns.Name: KEY
columns.Comments: The column is a unique identifier for each row

columns.Name: LOCALE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the locale of the delivery option

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the object id to be referred

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the type of the object used

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the unique identifier for the person

columns.Name: DEI_INFORMATION_NUMBER4
columns.Comments: The column indicates the information number

columns.Name: PUBLISH
columns.Comments: The column indicates the option for publishing the data

columns.Name: DEI_INFORMATION_NUMBER5
columns.Comments: The column indicates the information number

columns.Name: PUBLISH_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the publishing date

columns.Comments: The column indicates the information number

columns.Comments: The column indicates the information number

columns.Name: DEI_INFORMATION_NUMBER10
columns.Comments: The column indicates the information number

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the comments to be added for DOR

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: The column indicates the start date of the report

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: The column indicates the end date of the report

columns.Name: DEI_INFORMATION1

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: GROUP_TAG_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column is a reference for the parent child block link.
